Problem:
No water flow display when
water is flowing.
Correction: Shift bypass valve to not-in-bypass position.

Cause:
Meter probe disconnected or not fully
connected to meter housing.
Correction: Fully insert probe into meter housing.

Cause:
Restricted meter turbine rotation due to
foreign material in meter !
Correction:
Remove meter housing, free up turbine and flush
with clean water. Turbine should spin freely. If not,
replace meter. (Contact dealer.)

Replace meter cable (no meter cable for the 460TC)
(Contact dealer.)

Problem:
Continuous regeneration.
Camshaft does not stop at
the end of regeneration.
Correction:
Replace optical sensor (no sensor for the 460TC).
(Contact dealer.)

Problem:
Run out of soft water
between regenerations.
Correction:
Repeat regeneration, making certain that correct
salt dosage is used.

Set salt control to proper level. See salt setting
chart.
Set to correct values. See Programming section.

Set hardness or days to new value. See
Programming section.

Correction:
